note: Official expectation model only — live integration NOT executed.
authMethod: Cookie session, HTTP Basic (basic_auth module), or OAuth2 (simple_oauth module). Read access may be anonymous if permitted.

errors.title: Forbidden
errors.detail: The current user is not allowed to POST the selected resource.

commonIntegrationFailure: 415 Unsupported Media Type when Content-Type is not application/vnd.api+json; 403 when the JSON:API module is read-only or the user lacks create permission.
preventionRule: Always send and accept application/vnd.api+json; enable JSON:API write mode and grant permissions before POST; use UUIDs not numeric ids.
